explanation: This command includes the required flags '/user:', '/pass:', and '/dcip:' as specified in the Sigma rule. It simulates a typical execution of SharpLDAPmonitor.exe with valid command-line arguments.
This command uses substitution by replacing '/' with '-', which is a common equivalent syntax in command-line tools. It maintains the same behavior while altering the format.
This command omits unnecessary whitespace and uses minimal formatting to simulate a compact execution of the tool. It retains all required flags.
This command reorders the arguments, which is often accepted by command-line tools. It still includes all required flags as specified in the Sigma rule.
This command uses recoding by enclosing the IP address in backticks, which may be parsed correctly by the tool. It maintains the required flags and values.
